Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action

Class FlixelActionDigital

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelAction
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.action.FlixelActionDigital
public final class FlixelActionDigital extends FlixelAction
Boolean action: any FlixelInputBinding that evaluates true, OR optional Steam digital for the same FlixelAction.getName(), makes pressed() true for this frame.

Setup

Call addBinding(FlixelInputBinding) only during construction or loading (not each frame). Multiple bindings are OR'd: jump might accept Space, gamepad A, and a touch region.

Reading in gameplay

  • pressed() while a key is held (sustains, movement gates).
  • justPressed() or check() for a single-frame edge (tap notes, menu confirm).
  • justReleased() when the player releases after a hold.

State is refreshed in FlixelActionSet.update(float) (via FlixelActionSets.updateAll(float)). FlixelActionSet.endFrame() (via FlixelActionSets.endFrameAll()) runs after FlixelGame.render() finalizes keys and mouse, matching their justPressed timing.

Optional callback

FlixelAction.callback runs on the press edge when assigned; prefer a single static Runnable to avoid allocating lambdas in hot paths.
